message:
test(core): add 8 s55h conformance oracle tests for views, triggers, ALTER TABLE, UPSERT, aggregate filter

Covers: view queries (CREATE VIEW + SELECT from view), trigger with NEW/OLD
references (UPDATE/DELETE audit logging), ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN with DEFAULT,
UPSERT DO UPDATE SET with excluded refs, aggregate with CASE filter expressions,
multiple indexes query patterns, nested aggregate subquery (aggregate of
aggregate via derived table), multi-column UNIQUE constraint with OR IGNORE/REPLACE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
